candidate_definition_hints.text: EXI for JSON - How EXI can be used to represent JSON data efficiently

**_exificient-for-json_** is an implementation of the EXI4JSON specification (see <https://www.w3.org/TR/exi-for-json/>) in Java. EXI4JSON converts JSON to event streams which result in a very processing efficient and compact format. Lossless round-trip conversion back to the or…
